entries.title: Complete assigned models, focusing on craftsmanship. 2nd-Year Models include more complex envelopes and boxes.

entries.content:
Grade 3 students who are new to sloyd should take Sloyd: Intro and then continue the courses in sequence.

Prerequisite: Sloyd: Level 1
